insight.headline: Customer API Changes
insight.what_changed: The Customer Account API has removed the deprecated Customer.lastIncompleteCheckout field and the related Checkout type subtree in version 2026-10. This change affects apps using the Customer Account API to manage customer checkouts.
insight.developer_impact: Developers should review their app's code to ensure it does not rely on the removed fields. They should update their API version to 2026-10 and modify their code to handle the removal of the Customer.lastIncompleteCheckout field. Additionally, developers should test their app to ensure it works as expected with the updated API. The GraphQL Admin API and Storefront API may be affected, so developers should review their API calls and update them accordingly.
insight.merchant_impact: Merchants may experience issues with apps that have not been updated to handle the removal of the Customer.lastIncompleteCheckout field. Merchants should contact the app developer if they experience any issues.
insight.why_it_matters: This change is important because it affects how apps manage customer checkouts and interact with the Customer Account API. Developers must update their apps to ensure they work correctly with the updated API.

also_worth_knowing.text: Updated App Store requirements: 4.1.2 Use a unique name for your app

updates.title: @shopify/cli-hydrogen@13.0.2
updates.summary: Hydrogen CLI now supports non-interactive shop and storefront creation flags and allows bypassing confirmation prompts in hydrogen upgrade.

updates.title: Updated App Store requirements: 4.1.2 Use a unique name for your app
updates.summary: Updated App Store requirements now mandate unique app names to reduce merchant confusion.

updates.title: `productId`, `title`,`variantSku`, and `variantTitle` fields added to `ExchangeLineItem`
updates.summary: New fields added to ExchangeLineItem: productId, title, variantSku, and variantTitle.

updates.title: POS UI Extensions 2026-07 adds discount allocations to bundle components
updates.summary: POS UI Extensions now include discount allocations to bundle components, starting with API version 2026-07.
New store commands introduced in CLI version 4.5.0, including listing and store creation.

updates.title: @shopify/cli-hydrogen@13.0.1
updates.summary: Hydrogen CLI now reads disabled command metadata and preserves actionable build errors during deployment.

updates.title: @shopify/create-hydrogen@5.0.38
updates.summary: New Hydrogen projects now include an explicit ~ app alias.

updates.title: skeleton@2026.4.5
updates.summary: Hydrogen skeleton updated to version 2026.4.5 with an explicit ~ app alias.

updates.title: POS Extensions now supports a background extension target
updates.summary: POS Extensions now support a background extension target, allowing event observation and background logic without rendering UI.

updates.title: Identity verification for Shopify Partners starts today
updates.summary: Identity verification for Shopify Partners is now required, enhancing trust and security in the ecosystem.

updates.title: App Pricing: more plans, no-charge plan testing, and negative and fractional App Events
updates.summary: App Pricing updates include increased plan limits, no-charge plan testing, and support for negative and fractional App Events.

recap.headline: Hydrogen and Shopify API updates with new features and requirements

themes.title: Hydrogen Updates
themes.detail: Hydrogen received several updates, including the addition of non-interactive shop and storefront creation flags, the ability to bypass confirmation prompts in hydrogen upgrade, and patch changes to @shopify/cli-hydrogen and @shopify/create-hydrogen. These updates aim to improve the development experience and provide more flexibility in Hydrogen projects.

themes.title: Shopify API and Changelog Updates
themes.detail: The Shopify API and Changelog have been updated with new features, including the addition of fields to ExchangeLineItem, discount allocations to bundle components in POS UI Extensions, and support for background extension targets in POS Extensions. Additionally, there are new requirements for app names and identity verification for Shopify Partners.

actions.text: Review and update apps to meet new App Store requirements, including unique app names
Test and implement new features from Hydrogen and Shopify API updates
Complete identity verification for Shopify Partners
